task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenMRS Administration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the OpenMRS Administration dashboard (URL containing /openmrs/admin).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Role or Manage Roles page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Add Role' form or 'Manage Roles' interface in OpenMRS.
The text 'Lab Technician' is visible in the Role Name input field.
The text 'Role for laboratory staff to view patients and manage lab results' is visible in the Description input field.

task_completion.description: Ensure no inherited roles are selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Inherited Roles' selection box or list has no items highlighted, checked, or selected.

task_completion.description: Select exactly the six required privileges
task_completion.visual_evidence: The privileges 'Get Patients', 'Get Encounters', 'Get Observations', 'Add Observations', 'Edit Observations', and 'Get Orders' are checked or highlighted in the Privileges list.
A success message (e.g., 'Role saved') is visible, or 'Lab Technician' is shown as an existing entry in the Manage Roles list.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMRS web interface to create the role
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place in a web browser showing the OpenMRS GUI, not via terminal commands, scripts, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with actual application form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for role name, description, and privileges are entered into the genuine OpenMRS HTML form elements, not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Agent actually submitted the form rather than just filling it out
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a screenshot showing the aftermath of clicking 'Save' (like a confirmation banner or the updated roles table), proving the action was finalized.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The role name must be exactly 'Lab Technician'. The description must contain the keywords 'laboratory', 'staff', and 'lab results'. The role must have exactly six privileges selected: 'Get Patients', 'Get Encounters', 'Get Observations', 'Add Observations', 'Edit Observations', and 'Get Orders'. It is strictly forbidden to select any inherited roles (the inherited roles list must be empty).
